What We Offer

Our Services

From a single couch to a full commercial building — Mukoti delivers a touch of perfection across Johannesburg.

Hover to explore

What We Clean

Residential
Upholstery & Couch Cleaning
Deep steam extraction on all fabric types — L-shape, 3-seater, 5-seater, dining chairs and more. We restore your furniture to showroom condition.
From R350 per item
Residential & Commercial
Carpet & Mattress Cleaning
Stain removal, deodorising and deep extraction. Perfect for bedrooms, lounges and offices with wall-to-wall carpeting.
Custom Quote
Residential
Full House Deep Clean
Comprehensive top-to-bottom deep clean including windows, kitchens, bathrooms, floors and all surfaces. Includes post-construction cleans.
From R1,150 full house
Commercial
Office & Commercial Cleaning
Regular and once-off office cleans, boardrooms, reception areas, ablutions and hard floor care for businesses across Johannesburg.
From R94 per hr
Industrial
Industrial & Pavement Cleaning
High-pressure washing of factory floors, warehouses, driveways and pavements. Specialised equipment for heavy-duty environments.
From R17 per m²

Tell us about your space and we'll recommend the right service and give you a free quote.

How It Works

Our Process

01
Get a Quote
WhatsApp or call us with your requirements. We respond fast.
02
We Confirm
We confirm date, time and pricing — no hidden fees.
03
We Clean
Our trained team arrives on time with all equipment.
04
You Approve
We don't leave until you're 100% satisfied.
